description_long: This cabin features a broad, overhanging gable roof with a dark, shingled texture and a large wraparound porch on at least two sides. The structure is elevated on short stilts or posts, with a wooden railing enclosing the porch area. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic yet orderly appearance. Multiple rectangular windows are evenly spaced along the longer facades, providing ample natural light. A single main entrance door is visible, opening onto the porch, and the overall design suggests a blend of traditional and functional architecture. The cabin sits on a rectangular concrete or paved base, suitable for urban or suburban placement.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a wide gable roof, wraparound porch, and multiple evenly spaced windows, elevated on short posts and set on a rectangular paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door opening onto the porch, with the gable roof and wooden railing clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade with multiple evenly spaced windows and the full length of the porch railing.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite end view showing the back of the cabin, porch extension, and the continuation of the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, railing, and the series of windows along the facade.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs and dark shingle texture
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple medium-sized rectangular windows evenly spaced along the longer facades in a symmetrical pattern
attribute_door_placement: single main entrance door centered on the front facade, opening onto the porch

license_info.creator_display_name: พระมหาเจดีย์ศรีแสงธรรมวิสุทธิมงคล
